name: Pacific Fisher
conservationEfforts: Reintroduced to Olympic National Park and North Cascades. Illegal marijuana grow site cleanup removes rodenticide threat. Listed as threatened under California Endangered Species Act.
description: A large member of the weasel family found in Pacific Northwest old-growth forests. They are one of the few predators capable of killing porcupines. Rodenticide from illegal cannabis farms is a major emerging threat.
